title: Flash Loan Attack on Exchange Rate During Mint
reason: Misreads the code path: `mintFresh()` reads the exchange rate before `doTransferIn()` at line 1594, not after. The real issue is donation-driven exchange-rate inflation, which is captured separately.

title: Flash Loan Attack on Exchange Rate During Redeem
reason: Changing cash after `redeemFresh()` computes `redeemAmount` does not increase the already-fixed payout. The plausible issue here is stale-state reentrancy during `doTransferOut()`, captured separately.

title: Missing Zero-Address Validation on Initialize
reason: Initializing with zero comptroller or interest model does not silently succeed: `_setComptroller()` and `_setInterestRateModelFresh()` call marker methods that revert on invalid addresses. This is not a distinct exploit.

title: Unsafe ERC-20 Approval Pattern
reason: This is the standard ERC-20 allowance overwrite behavior on the cToken share token, explicitly documented in the code comments. It is a known user-level caveat, not a protocol-specific vulnerability.

title: Admin Can Set Arbitrary Initial Exchange Rate
reason: This is a trusted deployment/configuration parameter chosen at market creation, not a permissionless exploit against deployed users.

title: Potential State Manipulation Through Block Delta
reason: Depends on mocked or test-only `getBlockNumber()` behavior rather than a realistic deployed attack path.

title: Missing Event Emission on Initialize
reason: Operational/informational observation only; no realistic protocol harm.

title: Deprecated Solidity Version
reason: Generic technical-debt note, not a concrete vulnerability in this codebase.
